# Wordle — portal submission

**Title:** Five

**Tagline:** Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. One puzzle a day, shared by everyone.

**Controls:** Type letters, tap the on-screen keyboard, Enter to submit, Backspace to delete.

**Tags:** word, puzzle, daily, casual, mobile, highscore

**Description:**
A daily 5-letter word puzzle — everyone gets the same word each day. Six guesses, color-coded feedback, and a shareable result grid to brag (or commiserate) with friends without spoiling the answer. Keep your streak alive, or switch to unlimited Practice mode for extra rounds anytime.

## Where to upload
- itch.io  (Kind: HTML, check 'mobile friendly', set viewport ~520x720, upload wordle.zip)
- CrazyGames developer portal (HTML5; add their SDK for rev-share before submitting)
- GameDistribution / Playgama Bridge (one build to many portals)

> Reminder: integrate a portal SDK's rewarded-video before monetized submission; itch.io accepts the plain zip as-is for the first real-world signal.
